case_title: LI, BENA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM et al vs. HALL, CHRISTOPER et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, BENA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM LI, RAYMOND, AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, CHRISTOPER DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-01-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-27-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-14-2000
CLERICAL ERROR, SUMMONS WAS NOT ISSUED
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM GRANTED BY JUDGE CHIANTELLI FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, BENA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM LI, RAYMOND, AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LI, BENA A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM LI, RAYMOND, AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2000, OFF CALENDAR AUG 8,2000 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY LAWRENCE WONG. HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-11-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LAWRENCE WONG, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-26-2000 CONTINUED FROM OCT-11-2000 TO DEC-20-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
